subcodes.first_line: The friends must leave the deeds and actions of the oppressors to God, and must in no wise interfere therewith [3.5s]... ...He who acteth, in this day, according to what hath been revealed in the Book of God—and whose heart hath been sanctified from doubt, enmity, hatred, and whatever ill beseemeth the station of humankind—is to be numbered with the Concourse on High
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوستان باید افعال و اعمال ظالمین را بحق گذارند و بهیچوجه متعرض نشوند
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastisement and requital, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @suffering and imprisonment
